lines.english: He is entangled with his children, his wife and household affairs.
Again and again, he clings to it.
The mortal claims this body as his own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਸੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਰਾਮ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kavan su bidh jit raam gun gaae |
lines.english: What is that way, by which the Lord's Praises might be sung?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਸੁ ਮਤਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਤਰੈ ਇਹ ਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kavan su mat jit tarai ih maae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: What is that intellect, by which this person might swim across, O mother? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਨੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਰਾਮ ਕੇ ਦਾਸਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hon na paaeeai raam ke daasaa |1|
lines.english: He cannot be the slave of the Lord. ||1||
If someone tells him the truth, he looks upon that as poison.
He cannot tell victory from defeat.
That which is for his own good, he thinks is evil.
The demented fool drinks in the deadly poison,
This is the way of life in the world of the faithless cynic. ||2||
while he believes the Ambrosial Naam to be bitter.
he wanders lost through 8.4 million incarnations. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਿ ਰਸਿ ਭੋਗ ਕਰਹਿ ਬਹੁ ਰੰਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: ras ras bhog kareh bahu rangee |
lines.english: immersed in the pleasures of love, they frolic in so many ways.
The birds are caught in the net of Maya;
He does not even approach the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy;

lines.translit: gur poorai taa ke kaatte jaal |4|13|82|
lines.english: Unto whom the Lord has shown His Mercy. ||4||13||82||
Says Nanak, the Perfect Guru has cut away the noose from those,
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:
By Your Grace, we find the Way.
By God's Grace, we are released from our bondage.
By God's Grace, we meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
As You assign me, so I take to Your service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਤੇ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਦੇਵ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ham te kachhoo na hovai dev |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By myself, I cannot do anything at all, O Divine Lord. ||1||Pause||
By Your Grace, egotism is eradicated. ||1||
If it pleases You, then I sing the Word of Your Bani.
If it pleases You, then the True Guru showers His Mercy upon me.
If it pleases You, then I speak the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਗੁਣ ਤੁਮ ਹੀ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: sarab nidhaan gun tum hee paas |
lines.english: The treasure of all excellence is with You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਸਚੁ ਧਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaavai so sach dharamaa |
lines.english: Whatever pleases You is the true faith of Dharma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਕਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaavai so niramal karamaa |
lines.english: Whatever pleases You is a pure action of karma.
All peace comes by Your Kindness, God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: man tan niramal hoe har rang |
lines.english: The mind and body become immaculate through the Lord's Love.
Your servant prays to You, O Lord and Master. ||3||
All peace is found in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.
Nanak affirms this as his greatest pleasure. ||4||14||83||
My mind remains attuned to Your Name;
but your thirst shall not depart, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਕਾ ਤੂੰ ਚਾਖਹਿ ਸਾਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: har ras kaa toon chaakheh saad |
lines.english: But when you taste the sweet flavor the the Lord's sublime essence
You may taste the other flavors,
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:
O dear beloved tongue, drink in the Ambrosial Nectar.
- upon tasting it, you shall be wonder-struck and amazed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਰਸ ਰਾਤੀ ਹੋਇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eih ras raatee hoe tripataaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Imbued with this sublime essence, you shall be satisfied. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਮਖ ਨਿਮਖ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: nimakh nimakh har har har dhiaau |
lines.english: Each and every moment, meditate on the Lord, Har, Har, Har.
Do not listen to any other, and do not go anywhere else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੇ ਜਿਹਵੇ ਤੂੰ ਰਾਮ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: he jihave toon raam gun gaau |
lines.english: O tongue, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.
By great good fortune, you shall find the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||2||
Twenty-four hours a day, O tongue, dwell upon God,
Here and hereafter, you shall be happy forever.
The Unfathomable, Supreme Lord and Master.
All the vegetation will blossom forth for you, flowering in fruition;
Chanting the Glorious Praises of the Lord, O tongue, you shall become priceless. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਰਸ ਰਾਤੀ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਛੋਡੇ ॥
lines.translit: eih ras raatee bahur na chhodde |
lines.english: imbued with this sublime essence, you shall never leave it again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਸਹਾਈ ॥੪॥੧੫॥੮੪॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak gur bhe hai sahaaee |4|15|84|
lines.english: Says Nanak, the Guru has become my Support. ||4||15||84||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਨ ਰਸ ਕਸ ਲਵੈ ਨ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aan na ras kas lavai na laaee |
lines.english: No other sweet and tasty flavors can compare to it.
The mind is the temple, and the body is the fence built around it.
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:
